final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-video cover for an 8K GGU gaming monitor launch.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist, premium aesthetic — exact restraint level and material choice are yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds framing
Subject: must include the 8K GGU gaming monitor as the focal product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium tech atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures:

Constraints: must be vertical format optimized for short-video platforms, large headline must dominate for visual impact
Avoid:
